hero.description: MedTour helps international patients access partner clinics in Kazakhstan with a personal manager handling documents, doctor matching, travel and treatment logistics.

hero_card.title: Personal Medical Case
hero_card.subtitle: Managed by the MedTour team
hero_card.item_0_desc: NNMC, MexelHealth and UMIT/Tomotherapy in Astana
hero_card.item_1_desc: A coordinator routes your case to the right clinic and doctor
hero_card.item_2_desc: Visa, flights, hotel, transfer and in-country support

features.title: Why Choose MedTour
features.subtitle: One accountable team for treatment, logistics and patient support
features.card_0_desc: Online consultation helps the clinic understand whether treatment or surgery is needed.
features.card_1_desc: Data encryption and compliance with medical security standards.
features.card_2_desc: A MedTour manager keeps the case moving from first contact to post-care.
features.card_3_desc: Visa, tickets, hotel, transfer, treatment visits and discharge documents are tracked in one flow.

specializations.title: Start with your medical need
specializations.subtitle: You do not need to choose a doctor yourself. MedTour routes your case to the right clinic.

steps.title: Just 4 Simple Steps
steps.subtitle: From first request to treatment in Kazakhstan
steps.step_0_desc: Register and describe your diagnosis, symptoms and preferred travel dates
steps.step_1_desc: Add analyses, scans, discharge summaries and referrals for medical review
steps.step_2_desc: A partner doctor reviews your case during an online consultation
steps.step_3_desc: MedTour coordinates treatment plan, visa, travel, arrival and in-country support

testimonials.title: What Our Patients Say
testimonials.subtitle: Over 1,000 satisfied patients
testimonials.review_0: MedTour helped us understand the treatment route before travelling and kept all documents in one place.
testimonials.review_1: The personal manager made the process clear: clinic, doctor, dates and travel steps.
testimonials.review_2: It was important not to wait months. The online consultation and plan helped us decide quickly.

about.title: MedTour — treatment in Kazakhstan, managed end to end
about.description: We connect international patients with partner clinics in Kazakhstan and coordinate the non-medical journey around the treatment.
about.bullet_0: Three partner clinics covering major treatment directions
about.bullet_2: Secure document handling and case communication
about.bullet_3: Visa, hotel, transfer and post-care workflow

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: We are always available and ready to answer your questions
contact.quick_desc: Create a medical case and the MedTour team will review the next steps with you.
contact.quick_bullet_0: No need to choose a doctor yourself
contact.quick_bullet_1: Documents reviewed by the coordination team
contact.quick_bullet_2: Plan, chat and status saved to your account

cta.title: Start your medical case today
cta.description: Register, upload your documents and let MedTour coordinate clinic matching, consultation and the treatment journey.

footer.description: Global medical tourism platform for managed treatment in Kazakhstan.

case_next_step.NEW_LEAD: Your case has been received. Our team will contact you shortly to verify your details.
case_next_step.REGISTERED: Please upload your medical documents so our coordinator can begin the review.
case_next_step.WAITING_FOR_DOCUMENTS: Please upload your medical documents (test results, scans, discharge summaries) so the coordinator can review your case.
case_next_step.DOCUMENTS_UPLOADED: Your documents have been received. The medical coordinator is reviewing them — usually within 4 hours.
case_next_step.UNDER_REVIEW: Your case is being reviewed by our medical coordinator. A doctor will be assigned shortly.
case_next_step.DOCTOR_ASSIGNED: A doctor has been assigned to your case. The treatment plan will be ready soon.
case_next_step.WAITING_PATIENT_CONFIRMATION: Your treatment plan is ready. Please review it and either accept or decline.
case_next_step.WAITING_PAYMENT: Please complete the payment to book your consultation with the doctor.
case_next_step.CONSULTATION_BOOKED: Your consultation is booked. You will receive a link before the scheduled time.
case_next_step.CONSULTATION_COMPLETED: Your consultation is complete. The doctor's decision and next steps will appear here.
case_next_step.LOCAL_TREATMENT: Based on the consultation, treatment in your home country is recommended. Our team will provide guidance.
case_next_step.TREATMENT_IN_KAZAKHSTAN: Treatment in Kazakhstan is confirmed. We will begin preparing your trip.
case_next_step.TRAVEL_PREPARATION: We are preparing your trip: visa, flights, hotel and transfer. We will keep you updated.
case_next_step.ARRIVED_TO_KAZAKHSTAN: Welcome to Kazakhstan! Your treatment begins soon. Contact your manager if you need assistance.
case_next_step.IN_TREATMENT: You are currently receiving treatment at our partner clinic. We are here to support you.
case_next_step.RECOVERY: Treatment is complete. You are in the recovery phase. Please follow the doctor's recommendations.
case_next_step.COMPLETED: Your case is complete. Thank you for trusting MedTour. We hope you feel better soon!
case_next_step.CANCELLED: This case has been cancelled. Please contact us if you have questions or would like to open a new case.

case_detail.patient_follow_up_prompt: The consultation is completed. You can book a follow-up consultation if needed.

onboarding.title: Case successfully created!
onboarding.step1_desc: Your case is in the system. Our manager has been notified and will contact you within 2–4 hours.
onboarding.step2_desc: The more detailed your documents, the faster and more accurately the doctor can assess your situation. Upload lab results, MRI/CT scans, discharge summaries.
onboarding.step3_desc: A manager will find the right specialist at one of our partner clinics (NNMC, MexelHealth, UMIT) and assign them to your case.
onboarding.step4_desc: The doctor will hold an online consultation, review your documents, and give a decision on whether and what treatment is needed.
onboarding.step5_desc: You will receive a personalised treatment plan with procedures, cost, and timeline. You can accept or decline it.
onboarding.step6_desc: Our coordinator will arrange your visa, hotel, and airport transfer. You will be met and guided through every stage of treatment.

plan_trip.no_case: Create a medical case to see your treatment plan and travel checklist.
plan_trip.no_plan: The treatment plan is not ready yet.
plan_trip.plan_pending_details: The MedTour team will publish details after medical review.
plan_trip.timeline_hint: Detailed status changes are available in the case card timeline.

platform_guide.subtitle: Watch the short videos before getting started: how to create a medical case, upload documents, join a consultation and communicate with the support team.

platform_guide.after_desc: The dashboard will open. This guide will not be shown automatically again.
